title: Don't take it sentimentally: Supreme Court turns down urgent hearing of plea against Cockroach Janta Party
description: The Supreme Court on Monday refused an urgent hearing of a plea for a probe by the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) into the activities of persons associated with the Cockroach Janta Party - the satirical social media movement born out of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant's recent "cockroach" remark.When Advocate NK Goswami, appearing for the petitioner, said that the Party was tarnishing the image of the judiciary, a Bench of CJI Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and VM Pancholi said
